differential_diagnoses: Hypersensitivity pneumonitis with severe secondary pulmonary hypertension
Connective tissue disease-associated interstitial lung disease with PH
next_steps: Perform surgical lung biopsy for histopathological evaluation
Consultation with a lung transplant team for urgent assessment
Carefully titrate or discontinue pulmonary vasodilators due to risk of pulmonary edema in potential PVOD/PCH
Screen for underlying connective tissue disorders using more specific markers like Scl-70 or capillaroscopy
